query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pending_payrolls (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  group_id INT NOT NULL,
  employee_id INT NULL,
  employee_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  position VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  base_salary DECIMAL(10,2) NULL,
  net_salary DECIMAL(10,2) NULL,
  advance_amount DECIMAL(10,2) NULL,
  vt_daily DECIMAL(10,2) NULL,
  va_monthly DECIMAL(10,2) NULL,
  competence_month INT NULL,
  competence_year INT NULL,
  raw_data JSON NULL,
  pdf_url VARCHAR(500) NULL,
  status ENUM('pending','approved','rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
